summary: Iteration 216 - Global Audio Engine (Zen Toggle) Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Zen Toggle button visible in SmartDock with data-testid='dock-zen-toggle'. (2) Icon color changes: green (rgb(34,197,94)) when unmuted, red (rgb(239,68,68)) when muted. (3) Mute state persists in body attribute data-audio-muted='true'/'false'. (4) localStorage persistence via cosmic_prefs.sovereignMute. (5) All dock buttons present. (6) CosmicAssistant and CosmicMixer buttons NOT overlapping (20px gap). (7) Backend APIs working. (8) Botany page loads with Five Elements Wheel, plant catalog, mastery tier panel.
critical_code_review_comments: SensoryContext.js lines 43-47: data-audio-muted body attribute broadcast - VERIFIED working
SensoryContext.js lines 77-114: sovereignMuteToggle with logarithmic fade (500ms) - VERIFIED implemented
SensoryContext.js lines 117-139: sovereignKillAll for long-press kill all - VERIFIED implemented
SmartDock.js lines 360-396: Zen Toggle DockBtn with onPointerDown/Up/Leave for long-press - VERIFIED implemented
SmartDock.js lines 431-471: DockBtn component accepts pointer event handlers - VERIFIED working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 216 verified Global Audio Engine (Zen Toggle) feature: (1) Zen Toggle button in SmartDock with data-testid='dock-zen-toggle'. (2) Click toggles sovereignMute in SensoryContext. (3) Icon color: green (#22C55E) unmuted, red (#EF4444) muted. (4) Body attribute data-audio-muted reflects state. (5) localStorage cosmic_prefs.sovereignMute persists state. (6) Long-press (1s) triggers sovereignKillAll. (7) DockBtn component forwards onPointerDown/Up/Leave for long-press detection. (8) CosmicAssistant at (1848,880) and CosmicMixer at (1856,952) have 20px vertical gap - no overlap.
